summary: CRITICAL BUG FIX VERIFIED: 'Insufficient permissions' error is now FIXED. Organizer can successfully edit another user's email and department. Full E2E testing completed for permission bug fix and enhanced recurrence features. All 23 backend tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed.
seed_data_creation: Test users created during permission tests with 'TEST_' prefix. E2E test updated participant 'Doctor Test 4' with email test_e2e_7681@hospital.com and specialty Nephrology-Test
context_for_next_testing_agent: Critical bug fix verified - case sensitivity issue in PUT /api/users/{user_id} endpoint was the root cause. The role check now correctly uses lowercase ['admin', 'organizer'] matching database values. Enhanced recurrence features fully working with Weekly day selection, Monthly day (1-31) selection, and required end dates.

critical_bug_fix.issue: Organizer getting 'Insufficient permissions' error when editing other users
critical_bug_fix.root_cause: Case sensitivity in role check - endpoint checked ['Admin', 'Organizer'] but DB stores lowercase ['admin', 'organizer']

enhanced_recurrence_ui.weekly_day_selector: PASS - shows Day of Week dropdown when Weekly selected
enhanced_recurrence_ui.monthly_day_selector: PASS - shows Day of Month (1-31) dropdown when Monthly selected
enhanced_recurrence_ui.recurrence_end_date: PASS - required field appears for all recurring types
enhanced_recurrence_ui.meeting_start_date_label: PASS - correctly shows 'Meeting Start Date' instead of 'Date'
enhanced_recurrence_ui.recurrence_options: PASS - One Time, Daily, Weekly, Monthly, Monthly on... all available

enhanced_recurrence_backend.monthly_on_pattern: PASS - week_of_month and day_of_week combinations work
